title: Enterprise pricing
excerpt: Hi! Have been sending emails for around three weeks now and still haven’t received a response on Enterprise plan pricing. I have been using the contact form. Is there someone else I should be contacting? I see this quest…

posts.author: Bridget1 (Bridget McDonald)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Have been sending emails for around three weeks now and still haven’t received a response on Enterprise plan pricing. I have been using the contact form. Is there someone else I should be contacting? I see this question has been asked before, but I’m not sure if the answer applies to me. Cheers!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! Unfortunately, we had a bug with the form resulting in many people not receiving a reply from our team about the Enterprise pricing. If you reach out to support@monday.com, our support team can assist you and provide further pricing details! Sorry for the inconvenience here! Thanks for your understanding!
